text: What if life began in the depths of the ocean, at boiling vents? One leading idea suggests that life sparked where hot chemistry met cold ocean water. This is the alkaline vent hypothesis—active research that could rewrite our understanding of life's origins. Unlike the classic 'primordial soup,' which suggests life began in shallow waters, this theory dives deep. Could these extreme environments have given birth to the first living organisms? The evidence is growing. Want to dive deeper into life’s mysteries? Like and follow for more science secrets!
